feed.title: phoenixbankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Phoenix Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free Phoenix bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: The 341 Meeting of Creditors in Phoenix
entry.summary: What to expect at the 341 meeting in Phoenix bankruptcy. Questions asked, how to prepare, and what happens at the D. Ariz..

entry.title: The Automatic Stay in Phoenix Bankruptcy
entry.summary: Learn how the automatic stay protects Phoenix residents when filing bankruptcy. What stops immediately, what does not, stay violations, and.

entry.title: Bank Accounts and Bankruptcy in Phoenix
entry.summary: How bankruptcy affects your bank account in Phoenix, Arizona. Freezes, levies, exemptions, and how to protect your money when filing in the District of.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13? -- Phoenix
entry.summary: You need trustee approval and a court motion to purchase a vehicle during Chapter 13. [Phoenix]

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in Phoenix
entry.summary: How to buy a house after bankruptcy in Phoenix, Arizona. FHA, VA, and conventional loan waiting periods, credit rebuilding, and Arizona-specific.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy -- Phoenix
entry.summary: You have 60 days after filing to decide whether to assume (keep) or reject (surrender) your car lease. [Phoenix]

entry.title: Chapter 13 Eligibility in Phoenix
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility requirements in Phoenix, Arizona. Income requirements, debt limits, and how to qualify in the District of Arizona.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in Phoenix
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 plan payments work in Phoenix, Arizona. Payment amounts, what gets paid, how long, and what happens if you miss a payment in the.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Phoenix -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Phoenix. Payment plan basics, D. Ariz. dismissal rate (53.5%), timeline, 3-5 year commitment, and what to expect.
